official_functions.role: Create the real initialized source Entity fixture

official_functions.function_or_member: ClientboundSoundEntityPacket(Holder<SoundEvent>, SoundSource, Entity, float, float, long); SoundEvents.AMBIENT_CAVE
official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound sound_entity fixture
Write and dispatch the full Play clientbound framed packet

invariants: The official Play clientbound protocol codec writes packet id 0x74 before the sound_entity body.
The fixture preserves SoundEvents.AMBIENT_CAVE holder id, master source, source entity id 1, volume, pitch, seed, and consumes the body.
This contract does not prove arbitrary sound holders, entity ids, sound playback, world state, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this packet-support contract to infer arbitrary entity sound or playback semantics.
